case_title: MARTINEZ, SONIA A VS LIVENGOOD, ROBERT P et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSADO, JAVIER
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO ROSADO, JAVIER.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO LIVENGOOD, ROBERT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $534.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, SONIA A AS TO DEFENDANT LIVENGOOD, ROBERT P ROSADO, JAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE HANDED BEFORE COURT HEARING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, SONIA A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVENGOOD, ROBERT P ROSADO, JAVIER $534.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $564.00, DISMISS DEFENDANT LIVENGOOD, ROBERT WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO PLTF, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-21-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-25-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO FILE AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ROSADO; AND TO SERVE DEFENDANT LIVENGOOD
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO JAVIER ROSADO-NO FORWARDING ORDER ON FILE-RETURN TO POSTMASTER OF ORIGINAL ADDRESSEE FOR REVIEW.
COURT REQUIRED AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO JAVIER ROSADO FILED (SEE ABOVE FILING)
